assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 3): Sterilization Failure Prediction

Calendar month stratification = future data in training. ROC-AUC selection = internally inconsistent with stated AUPRC preference. Both documented in design text. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 3): Sterilization Failure Prediction

Temporal contamination via calendar-month distribution across partitions. ROC-AUC-based model selection contradicts design's own AUPRC guidance for 2-5% failure rate. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 3): Sterilization Failure Prediction

Strong held-out machine design, but calendar-month stratification undermines temporal validity. The AUPRC vs. ROC-AUC contradiction is particularly noteworthy — the design itself identifies the right metric but does not use it. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3)

Unanimous critique_wins: 3/3.

Verdict: critique_wins
